TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Pasing = Gaga mniq Tayungsu Hpingcyu ka alang Pasing. 376 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 966 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 42% niqan 410 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 58% niqan 556 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 39%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%.
S.PHON: = pasiŋ = gaga mniq tajuŋsu ħpiŋʦju ka alaŋ pasiŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, bunun *%.
S.FORM: = Pasing = Gaga mniq Tayungsu Hpingcyu ka alang Pasing. 376 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 966 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 42% niqan 410 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 58% niqan 556 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 39%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%.
S.PHON: = pasiŋ = gaga mniq tajuŋsu ħpiŋʦju ka alaŋ pasiŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, bunun *%.
